functions.title: Guide Book #100

§7Guide Book #100§r
§lHummingbird§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Passive
•§lMob type§r: Small bird, Animal, Aerial.
•§lSpawns in§r: Plains, Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Windswept Forest,

Jungle, Cherry Grove, Meadow, Savanna, Overgrown Jungle.
•§lHealth§r: 6
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.21
•§lFly speed§r: 0.45
•§lImmune to§r: Fall Damage
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Sugar
•§lHealed by§r: Sugar

•§lBreeds with§r: Sugar
•§lEgg laying§r: 1-4 Hummingbird Eggs.
•§lAging by§r: Sugar
•§lPossible drops§r: Green Feather, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r: Players, Monsters, Cave Wolf, Deopard, Ocelot, Wolf.
•Adult Hummingbird can spawn or produce

a Green Feather every 5 to 15 minutes.
•Can eat nectar from flowers, which grants them the Regeneration effect for 30 seconds.
